title: Faster launches stretch the circle into taller and taller ellipses
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — ellipses from (7e6, 0) at three speeds ---
import math as __m
def __orbit(M, v, dt, steps, every):
    G = 6.674e-11
    x = 7e6; y = 0.0; vx = 0.0; vy = v
    pts = [[round(x, 1), round(y, 1)]]
    for i in range(steps):
        r = __m.sqrt(x * x + y * y)
        if r < 1.0:
            break
        f = G * M / (r * r * r)
        vx += -f * x * dt; vy += -f * y * dt
        x += vx * dt; y += vy * dt
        if i % every == 0:
            pts.append([round(x, 1), round(y, 1)])
    return pts

def __plot(M):
    return [
        {"name": "circle (7546)", "points": __orbit(M, 7546, 4.0, 3000, 15), "highlight": False},
        {"name": "ellipse (8200)", "points": __orbit(M, 8200, 4.0, 3000, 15), "highlight": True},
        {"name": "tall ellipse (8700)", "points": __orbit(M, 8700, 4.0, 3000, 15), "highlight": False},
    ]
